creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Sean Farley from comment #0)
FYI:
570.142.04 of the driver is already released as Latest Production Branch of the driver.

As graphics/nvidia-drm-*-kmod have a regression on X11 as-is, I've contacted with ashafer@ privately and working on it (ports side).

And I need to decide newwly-added libraries on Linux version to be included into x11/linux-nvidia-libs or not.

The minimal fixes (treat alreay-incorporated and bumped libraries that have separate versioning scheme) are already done locally.
